words.def: change location; move, travel, or proceed, also metaphorically
words.zh: v. 移動, 移動到；感動（move的過去式, 過去分詞）

words.def: a visual presentation showing how something works
words.zh: n. 演示, 樣本唱片

words.def: the act of deciding to do something
words.zh: n. 移動, 遷居, 步驟

words.def: how something is done or how it happens
words.zh: n. 模態, 調式, 樣式, 文體, 狀態, 方式, 風尚
